GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6242685
  GpuHashJoinExec
    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6242685
      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_custkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6242685
          GpuFilterExec
            GpuScanExec: batch_size=6242685
    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6242685
      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_custkey@1], 8), input_partitions=8
        GpuScanExec: batch_size=6242685
--- memory ---
total_cost=1656
GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=168, subtree_max_row_bytes=344, input_bytes=168, output_bytes=168, cost=336
  GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=168, subtree_max_row_bytes=344, input_bytes=176, output_bytes=168, cost=344
    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=48, input_bytes=8, output_bytes=8, cost=16
      GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=48, input_bytes=8, output_bytes=8, cost=16
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=48, input_bytes=8, output_bytes=8, cost=16
          GpuFilterExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=48, input_bytes=40, output_bytes=8, cost=48
            GpuScanExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=40, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=40, cost=40
    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=168, subtree_max_row_bytes=168, input_bytes=168, output_bytes=168, cost=336
      GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=168, subtree_max_row_bytes=168, input_bytes=168, output_bytes=168, cost=336
        GpuScanExec: row_width=168, subtree_max_row_bytes=168, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=168, cost=168
